seoTitle: Babinda vs Badu Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Babinda and Badu Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Babinda vs Badu Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Babinda and Badu Island.
heading: Babinda vs Badu Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Babinda, Queensland and Badu Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Babinda has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Badu Island (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Babinda or Badu Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Babinda has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Badu Island scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Babinda scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Badu Island scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Babinda or Badu Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Babinda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
